name: StructuredWeb.org
description: StructuredWeb.org is the canonical verification anchor and mesh registry for AI-Structured Web v1.7. This node defines protocol compliance, trust alignment, and discovery sequencing for structured data deployments.

hasPart.name: AI-Structured Web Mesh
hasPart.description: Distributed schema mesh for AI-Structured Web v1.7. Contains nodes, trust anchors, and inference metadata.
